=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (3:16-3:25) TS2591: Cannot find name 'node:fs'. Do you need to install type definitions for node? Try `npm i --save-dev @types/node` and then add 'node' to the types field in your tsconfig.
  (no quick fixes)

  Fix 1: "Disable nodeBuiltinImport for entire file"
